feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SOAMANAGER Webservice - FM is not getting line items in Table Parameter
entry.content:
Hi All

I have created a webservice using SE37 RFC Function Module, having an Import parameter and Tables Parameter.

While passing data from SoapUI, Import Parameter is receiving the values which were passed whereas table parameter is showing the appended line item, but all values/columns of item are initial. Whereas Logs and XML Payload of SOAMANAGER is showing that Table item is having same items which were passed to SAP using SoapUI.

 

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:sap-com:document:sap:soap:functions:mc-style">
<soapenv:Header/>
<soapenv:Body>
<urn:ZfiInterface>
<Check>X</Check>
<ItFile>
<!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
<item>
<BILL_MONTH>202301</BILL_MONTH>
<READ_DATE>20230101</READ_DATE>
<DUE_DATE>20230102</DUE_DATE>
<BATCH>01</BATCH>
<SNO>1</SNO>
</item>
</ItFile>
<ItReturn2>
<!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
<item>
<Type></Type>
<Id></Id>
<Number></Number>
<Message></Message>
<LogNo></LogNo>
<LogMsgNo></LogMsgNo>
<MessageV1></MessageV1>
<MessageV2></MessageV2>
<MessageV3></MessageV3>
<MessageV4></MessageV4>
<Parameter></Parameter>
<Row></Row>
<Field></Field>
<System></System>
</item>
</ItReturn2>
</urn:ZfiInterface>
</soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.title: SWNC_COLLECTOR_GET_AGGREGATES
entry.content:
Trying to access ST03 related data through RFC 'SWNC_COLLECTOR_GET_AGGREGATES' when connecting with .Net Connector 3.1. 

 IRfcFunction rfcFunction = rfcRepository.CreateFunction("SWNC_COLLECTOR_GET_AGGREGATES");
            rfcFunction.SetValue("COMPONENT", "TOTAL");
            rfcFunction.SetValue("PERIODTYPE", 'D');
            rfcFunction.SetValue("PERIODSTRT", new DateTime(2024, 07, 07));
            rfcFunction.Invoke(_destination);

 At execution, getting following exception:

SAP.Middleware.Connector.RfcTypeConversionException
  HResult=0x80131600
  Message=FIELD READDIRTI of STRUCTURE SWNCAGGEXTSYSTEM (SETTER): cannot convert Byte[] into BCD[13:0]
  Source=<Cannot evaluate the exception source>
  StackTrace:
<Cannot evaluate the exception stack trace>

Inner Exception 1:
RfcTypeConversionException: Cannot convert byte[] of length 455 into a BCD of length 13

 

The data structure 'SWNCAGGEXTSYSTEM' in error message is actually associated with the table ' EXTSYSTEM' consumed by this RFC. Not sure what data is being transferred to this table and how to prevent  this run time error. 

I can execute this RFC successfully in SAP GUI from transaction 'se37' with same set of input parameter and can retrieve data from output table 'Times'.

The only data i'm interested to retrieve from this RFC is tcode and total #of dialog steps executed, with each step that is available from output table  'Times'. This RFC returns a lot of other data which is not of interest to me. Is there any other RFC to extract required data without overhead of extracting other statistical data? 
I found another RFC named 'SWNC_GET_WORKLOAD_STATISTIC' which also return similar set of data as 'SWNC_COLLECTOR_GET_AGGREGATES'. Interestingly, i'm not seeing any error when using this RFC form client machine and was able to get required data from table 'Times'.

entry.title: Is it impossible to connect by client when connecting SAP in SAP Registered Server Program?
entry.content:
hello everyone, I'm asking you because I'm curious conceptually.

 

Is it impossible to connect by clients when connecting SAP in SAP Registered Server Program?

I want to split SAP into clients and use it.

At this time, I would like to connect the service to each client that is separated.

For example, service A wants to connect to client number 100 only
It was also connected to client 200.

I'm asking if it's a fundamental way to do it because I can't find anything related in the reference document.

 

ex)

 

jco_31_documentation.pdf 

For example, is there no option like jco.server.clientno?

Thank you, and have a nice day.

entry.title: RFC SLD_UC/SLD_NUC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am having an error trying to push a system data into SLD but i have no more ideas on what to do.

The error is the following:

No what i have done so far was, adding the correct gateway host/service into the RFC (they were empty), validade the hosts file on SO side, tried to push the system info through RZ70 it gives error that why i ended up  checking the RFC and SLD configuration..

Pretty sure i am missing something but just cant figure what. I am trying to send this system info into the SLD in order for this system to show in solman_setup as i need to configure the managed systems.

Does anyone have any idea or can give me a help here?

entry.title: ABAP Enterprise Service - RFC Consumer - Where maintain RFC Destination / Logical Port
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a SAP S4 system and we did generate a RFC Consumer Proxy based on a RFC function call on another SAP System. 

The code generation did work fine but i dont see where i can maintain the logical port / the rfc destination for the runtime.

In SOAMANAGER I don´t find the consumer and in LP_CONFIG I dont see where to put the RFC Destination.

Someone an Idea?

Best regards Richard

entry.title: Change STMS Remote Login Client ID
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question, where can I change the parameters for the remote login for the STMS transport system?

When I want to transport a transport from the test system to the quality system, the client 000 is always displayed, but I want to set the client standard to 100, where can I make this setting?

Thank you very much for your help.

Best regards
Manuel Spitzer

entry.title: RFC Callback Positive List Mass Activation
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to do a mass RFC Callback Positive List Activation, instead of doing it for each RFC destination individually?

Thanks,

Jason

entry.title: occurs obsolete abap
entry.content:
hi,

I need to create a table that takes a structure that I created in SE11.
I used the Occors command:

DATA: gt_test LIKE ZTEST OCCURS 1000.

what can I use instead of occurs?

thank you

entry.title: How to update the train station field for vendor using BAPI for mass update.
entry.content: In the 'BP' T-Code, there is a field BAHNS (Train Station) in the Vendor: General Data tab. I couldn't find any BAPI for this BAHNS field. If a BAPI exists, please suggest one. If no BAPI is available, please help me by providing steps to extend the BAPI for the standard BAHNS field, as I couldn't find any steps for extending a standard field in a BAPI.

entry.title: Unable to Fetch the Redayness Report with RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA
entry.content:
Hello,

As per the given note- 2913617, we have implemented the required snotes which can be implementable in our system.

However we are still not getting the report as there is some error coming on.

entry.title: Legal Right to use RFC component
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,
I cannot find anything releated to the following topic:

We have a SAP customer, that has various RFC Function Modules provided by a third party company.

Is it legal to use and consume those RFC components? So once a Module has been transported to the customer's SAP he has the right to use this components anytime?
We are not talking about modifiying, Just to use them

I cannot find anythink releated in the SAP Knownledge base.

Many thanks in advance

entry.title: Different server groups for different queues in SMQR
entry.content:
Is it possible to assign different server groups for different inbound qRFC queues in SMQR (instead of one for all)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Listener error in RFC TCP/IP
entry.content:
I created an RFC type T, TCP/IP connection
however, when generating the connection for the connector with the Non SAP partner, this error message appeared

APPROVAL ERROR - 3.133.1 [JCoServerControllerThread] [ThrowableListener.java:20] Error in sap lister 709757/0|com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: Server startup failed at Tue Oct 22 16:28:50 BRT 2024. 709757/0|This is caused by a) erroneous server configurations, b) the backend system has been shut down, c) network issues. Will attempt the next boot in 128 seconds. 709757/0|Unable to start server: Connection to SAP gateway failed 709757/0| Connection parameters: PROGID="......

entry.title: FM CK_F_MATERIAL_CALC create cost estimation but no itemlization generate
entry.content: when we use FM CK_F_MATERIAL_CALC to create cost estimation , we can see the cost compoment view with cost result, but no cost itemization exists (display via CK13N).  is it the FM used right? thanks.

entry.title: Fiori mobile application direct print
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I have a odata service which returns bar code as raw string. I want to utilize it as direct print in my fiori screen without downloading in my mobile device.

NOTE : my odata service in xtream format 
( /sap/opu/odata/sap/ZMM_GRN_PROCESS_SRV_01/GRNPDFSet(PoNumber='')/$value )

Please put your thoughts.

entry.title: SAP Data retrieval inconsistency
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I recently encountered a discrepancy in data I retrieved with two methods on SAP Netweaver:
1) SE16 transaction and 2) RFC_READ_TABLE function

The RFC_READ_TABLE missed some of the rows which SE16 showed. There were no filters used, no truncation, and the data requested was just the BELNR column of the BSEG table. The same client was used to authorize the retrieval. Anyone knows what could be a cause as to why some rows are not extracted via RFC_READ_TABLE?

Thank you!

Niko

entry.title: Authorization for repl. model &1 and outbound implementation &2 missing.
entry.content:
When  i try to release an order for a material (Sending to another system via data replication), i sometimes see an error in SM58:
Authorization for repl. model &1 and outbound implementation &2 missing.

This error doesn’t always appear ( the same data, is using) and when i debug it in SM58, the entry processes successfully without showing anything unusual.

Could anyone help me find what causes this issue, and how can I fix it.  

Thanks

entry.title: Fetch data in ABAP, using SDA connection
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have data in table created on SDA connection, and want to fetch in ABAP.

Do we have any direct way to read data from SDA in ABAP?

One possible option for us is to, create virtual table in a database schema and fetch data in AMDP, and CDS table functions.

Thanks.

entry.title: How does SAP SLT send messages to Web Services?
entry.content:
I want to use SLT and Data Services to synchronize data from SAP HANA Database to PostgreSQL in real-time.

1. Firstly, I configured a DS task

2. Then I added it to the real-time service

3. Then I published it to Web Services

 

My question is how to use SLT to send real-time messages to web services? Do I need to use RFC? Can someone help me.

entry.title: ABAP Clean Core for Unreleased Function Module
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

I've a requirement to expose FM CREATE_RFC_REENTRANCE_TICKET as an oData Service. Conventional method was using SEGW to expose as an oData service to return the value I need. However for S/4 HANA 2023 Private Edition, how could I achieve it via Clean-Core approach?

Reference from https://github.com/SAP-samples/tier2-rfc-proxy

Are we able to wrap unreleased non-RFC FM using transaction ACO_PROXY? 

If can, after wrapping the FM, how could we expose it as consumable oData service that visible in transaction /iwfnd/maint_service?

#s4hana, #abapcleancore, #odata, #cleancoreguideline

Regards,

Ben
